headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -136.5)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 251% over 7 days (strong momentum)
Alert: Overall sentiment has significantly decreased (z=-2.06)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate heavily with 164 quotes and 150 at strong intensity, driving the score to 126.8 — people are venting with real force today.
• This is near the top of the 172-day range (ceiling at 169.8), making today one of the most frustrated days on record.
• Frustrations nearly quadrupled from yesterday's 33.8, while Fears recovered from a deep low and Optimism remains suppressed but slightly improved.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
